petal.name: Petal
petal.smashText: You snap Gerald in half. Petals spill from the crack. They dissolve into your skin.
petal.montorSmash: You BROKE Gerald?! ...he would have wanted it this way.

body.name: Bark Skin
body.description: +2 DEF, +1 END.

body.name: Roothold
body.description: Single hits can't reduce you below 3 HP.

body.name: Spore Cloud
body.description: When hit below 50% HP, all enemies DAZED 1 turn. Once per combat.

body.name: Toxic Spores
body.description: 15% chance when hit: attacker gets POISON 2 turns.

body.name: Regrowth
body.description: Heal 3 HP at the end of each combat.

body.name: Bloom
body.description: Heal 2 HP per chamber entered.

mind.name: Deep Roots
mind.description: +2 WIS. Body condition durations reduced by 1 turn.

mind.name: Fungal Confusion
mind.description: 15% chance when hit: attacker CHARMed 1 turn (attacks ally).

mind.name: Pollen Cloud
mind.description: On crit, all enemies BLIND 1 turn.

mind.name: Pollensense
mind.description: +3 PER permanently.

mind.name: Green Patience
mind.description: Consumable junk risk reduced by 2.

mind.name: Overgrowth
mind.description: Junk piles yield +50% gold.

dagger.name: Briar Flurry
dagger.description: Double-strikes apply stacking Briar Bleed (2 dmg/tick, stacks).

sword.name: Vine Bind
sword.description: 20% chance on hit: enemy skips next turn (entangled).

spear.name: Thorn Reach
spear.description: +2 damage. First hit each combat applies 2 BLEED stacks.

mace.name: Root Shatter
mace.description: DEF-ignoring hits also apply DAZE 1 turn.

axe.name: Harvest
axe.description: On kill, heal 5 HP + next hit deals +3 damage.

fists.name: Pollen Fist
fists.description: 30% chance per hit: BLIND 1 turn + 2 damage.

shield.name: Thornhide
shield.description: Attackers take 3 reflected damage when they hit you.

shield.name: Root Guard
shield.description: 20% chance to fully block an attack (0 damage).

stone.name: Stone
stone.smashText: You tip the gravy boat. The gravy pours out and never stops. The ceramic cracks and cold blue light floods out.
stone.montorSmash: That was grandmother's. She'll haunt YOU now.

body.name: Ironhide
body.description: Reduce all incoming damage by 2 (flat).

body.name: Stone Skin
body.description: +3 DEF permanently.

body.name: Bedrock
body.description: Below 15% HP, next 3 hits deal only 1 damage. Once per combat.

mind.name: Unshakeable
mind.description: Immune to DAZE.

mind.name: Mountain Mind
mind.description: 50% resist all mind conditions (FEAR/DAZE/CHARM).

mind.name: Tremor Sense
mind.description: +3 PER, immune to trap damage/conditions from searches.

shield.name: Glacial Wall
shield.description: Blocking has 25% chance to apply FROST.

bile.name: Bile
bile.smashText: You slam the toilet lid. It cracks clean in half. Sickly yellow vapour hisses from below.
bile.montorSmash: Do you have ANY idea how hard it is to get a plumber down here?

body.name: Toxic Presence
body.description: Enemies that hit you have 30% chance to get POISON.

body.name: Bile Blood
body.description: When poisoned yourself, heal 2 HP/turn instead of taking damage.

body.name: Rot Resistance
body.description: Immune to POISON and NAUSEA.

mind.name: Virulent Mind
mind.description: Your conditions last 1 extra turn on enemies.

mind.name: Hyperspreader
mind.description: When a poisoned enemy dies, all other enemies get POISON.

mind.name: Noxious Aura
mind.description: Enemies start combat with -1 STR.

weapon.name: Acid Edge
weapon.description: All hits reduce enemy DEF by 2 (stacks, persists in combat).

weapon.name: Toilet Hands
weapon.description: All hits have 40% chance to apply NAUSEA.

shield.name: Decay Aura
shield.description: Enemies lose 1 HP at start of their turn (passive).

blood.name: Blood
blood.smashText: You wind the music box backwards. The melody inverts. Something red seeps from the mechanism.
blood.montorSmash: That was the only thing that helped me sleep.

body.name: Lick Wounds
body.description: Your BLEED heals 1 HP/turn and gives +1 STR per stack instead of damaging.

body.name: Crimson Vitality
body.description: +20 max HP.

body.name: Bloodpact
body.description: Lifesteal 10% on all damage dealt.

mind.name: Bloodrage
mind.description: +2 STR when HP below 50%.

mind.name: Scent of Blood
mind.description: +1 damage for each enemy already killed this combat.

mind.name: Predator's Focus
mind.description: Immune to FEAR, +1 accuracy.

weapon.name: Savage Strikes
weapon.description: Hits deal +1 damage per BLEED stack on target.

shield.name: Crimson Counter
shield.description: When hit, 20% chance for free counter-attack.

shield.name: Iron Will
shield.description: Survive one lethal hit per combat (stay at 1 HP).

ember.name: Ember
ember.smashText: You bend the tongs. They snap. Orange sparks cascade and the heat rushes through your arms.
ember.montorSmash: Those were CALIBRATED. Centuries of calibration. Gone.

body.name: Forge Body
body.description: Immune to BURN, +2 DEF.

body.name: Heat Aura
body.description: Enemies that hit you take 2 fire damage.

body.name: Tempered
body.description: +10 max HP, -1 damage taken from all sources.

mind.name: Chain Lightning
mind.description: Crits deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.

mind.name: Napalm
mind.description: BURN you apply lingers 1 extra turn, dealing 2 dmg + AoE.

mind.name: Pyromaniac
mind.description: BURN you apply deals double burst damage.

weapon.name: Firestorm
weapon.description: Double strike hits also deal 2 AoE to other enemies.

shield.name: Flame Shield
shield.description: Attackers take 3 burn damage on hit.

shield.name: Smelt
shield.description: Blocking converts 50% of blocked damage into gold.

shield.name: Eruption
shield.description: When hit below 25% HP, deal 8 damage to all enemies. Once per combat.

void.name: Void
void.smashText: You blow out the night light. The darkness rushes in and curls around your fingers. It doesn't let go.

body.name: Phase Shift
body.description: +15% dodge chance.

body.name: Shadow Step
body.description: First attack each combat auto-misses you.

body.name: Void Skin
body.description: 25% chance conditions applied to you hit the attacker instead.

mind.name: Dice Corruption
mind.description: Enemy even d20 rolls are halved. No enemy crits possible.

mind.name: Chaos Reroll
mind.description: Once per combat, force an enemy to reroll their attack.

mind.name: Null Field
mind.description: Enemies have -2 to all rolls.

weapon.name: Void Strike
weapon.description: 10% of hits ignore ALL enemy DEF.

weapon.name: Shadow Blade
weapon.description: Misses have 30% chance to deal half damage anyway.

weapon.name: Entropy Edge
weapon.description: Weapon damage randomly +50% or -25% per hit.

shield.name: Null Block
shield.description: 15% chance to completely negate any attack (separate from dodge/block).

shield.name: Mirror Shield
shield.description: 25% of damage you take is also dealt to the attacker.
